data.title: Phreesia, Progress Software And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Monday
data.description: U.S. stock futures are up this morning on Monday, with investor attention likely to be on specific stocks. Americas Gold and Silver Corp. (NYSE: USAS) is anticipated to announce earnings of 1 cent per share on $33.23 million in revenue for the quarter. The company's shares increased by 3.6% to $5.50 at Friday's close. ARKO Petroleum Corp. (NASDAQ: APC) is also on analysts' radar, with expectations for quarterly earnings to reach 13 cents per share. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: New Study from TENA Reveals Menopause Care Across the US
data.description: In Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, as of March 30, 2026, menopause serves as a natural phase of life that impacts millions of women nationwide. Disparities in access to crucial resources such as information, healthcare, and emotional support can arise due to various factors, including disparities in local healthcare infrastructure.

data.title: Pragmatic Play Unveils New Slot Title 'Jelly Express'
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in Gibraltar, Pragmatic Play, a top content provider for the iGaming sector, launched Jelly Express, a new slot game featuring a gummy bear conductor navigating a candy-filled landscape. The game offers an immersive experience for players as they embark on a journey through this sweet world.

data.title: Ontinue Threat Intelligence Report Reveals Attackers Increasingly "Log In," Rather Than Breaking In
data.description: Reports have shown a 72% increase in stolen credential listings linked to LummaC2, with over 7,000 ransomware attacks reported worldwide in 2025. The data was released by Ontinue, a top provider of AI-driven Managed Extended Detection and Response (MXDR) solutions. This information was disclosed in Zurich, Switzerland on March 30, 2026.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric Announces Director Candidates
data.description: Mitsubishi Electric Corporation disclosed today that the nominees for Director positions, slated for election at the Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders set for June 2026, have been chosen during the Nomination Committee meeting held today. The Director Candidates and their current roles include Tatsuro Kosaka (Director at CHUGAI PHARMACEUTICAL CO., LTD.), Hiroyuki Yanagi (Director), and Masako Egawa (Chancellor at Seikei Gakuen). Mitsubishi Electric Corporation, listed as TOKYO: 6503, made this announcement from Tokyo.
